text.title: Knowledge Sharing Ritual Set Output Contract
text.summary: JSON Schema (draft 2020-12) for the Knowledge Sharing Ritual Set artefact. Validator enforces required keys + per-field constraints.

example.note: ritual_type wrong enum; missing occurred_on + presenter + artefact_url; action item lacks owner + due.

antipattern.description: Status set to an approved/sent state by the producing agent without a human reviewer entry.
Required field empty or replaced with a placeholder (n/a, unknown) without an anchored reason.
Prose paragraph stuffed into a field the schema declares as array or object.
